name: EraMind
description: EraMind is a fast-paced history quiz game that challenges your knowledge across time. From ancient civilizations to modern events, every round brings a fresh mix of 20 randomly selected questions, ensuring a new experience each time you play. Test your memory, sharpen your thinking, and explore key moments that shaped the world. Whether it’s famous leaders, historic battles, cultural milestones, or groundbreaking discoveries—EraMind keeps you on your toes with a wide range of topics.
